assertions.reason: bot/src/commands.test.ts proved /list, /attach, /detach, /stop, /status, /history, prompt parsing, and unknown-command handling; bot/src/bot-service.test.ts proved /list output, unique partial /attach, ambiguous /attach rejection, /status + /history on the active attachment, /detach stopping forwarding, /stop edge handling, and detached unknown-command/prompt errors; bot/src/relay.test.ts proved the relay client wrappers used by those commands.

bot/src/bot-service.test.ts proved successful /attach replies include the session state, turn count, and last agent-message preview; the inline runtime check captured the same summary text for an attached session.

bot/src/commands.test.ts proved non-slash text is parsed as a prompt with newlines preserved, bot/src/bot-service.test.ts proved detached prompts are rejected with attach guidance, and the inline runtime check showed an attached multi-line prompt was forwarded intact to session-1.

bot/src/formatter.test.ts and the inline formatter checks proved long plain text is split and code-block chunks keep markdown triple-backtick fences, but the inline runtime check showed an empty agent message still sends a chat message containing raw JSON instead of suppressing output, so the assertion as written does not hold.

commands.command: npm --prefix /data/dl/fschannel/bot test -- --reporter=verbose src/commands.test.ts src/formatter.test.ts src/relay.test.ts src/bot-service.test.ts
commands.observation: 32 tests passed across commands, formatter, relay, and bot-service coverage relevant to VAL-BOT-001/002/004/008.

Detached-prompt rejection, attach summary, multi-line prompt forwarding, long-message splitting, and code-block chunking passed; the empty-agent-message suppression check failed because BotService sent raw JSON text instead of suppressing the message.

summary: Validated 4 assertions for bot-service: VAL-BOT-001 passed, VAL-BOT-002 passed, VAL-BOT-004 passed, and VAL-BOT-008 failed because empty agent messages were forwarded as raw JSON instead of being suppressed.
